title: Query construction differs single vs campaign — don't double-target the location
summary: Single mode appends location to the query (server builds '{query} in {location}'), so put the place in search_query OR in location, never both. Campaign mode takes a BARE query plus country_code + filter and builds the per-location string itself — a city in the campaign search_query double-targets and wastes the run.
references: app/api/v1/lead_search.py:72-74 — single: search_query = f'{search_query} in {location}' when location set
